zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilhelm von Lüneburg於1184年4月11日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆時，他的父親Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria55歲，母親Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony30歲。他於1202年與Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可肯福利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1213年12月13日在德國尼德薩辛盧包格享年29歲，埋葬在德國薩辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilhelm von Lüneburg于1184年4月11日出生在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆时，他的父亲Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria55岁，母亲Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony30岁。他于1202年与Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可肯福利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1213年12月13日在德国尼德薩辛盧包格享年29岁，埋葬在德国薩辛。

en.Free and Hanseatic City of Hamburg, Germ: Free, Kerken, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilhelm von Lüneburg was born on 11 April 1184, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, was 55 and his mother, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, was 30. He married Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark in 1202, in Free, Kerken, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 December 1213, in Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 29, and was buried in Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilhelm von Lüneburg est né le 11 avril 1184, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark en 1202, à Free, Kerken, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1213, à Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Sachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilhelm von Lüneburg am 11. April 1184 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria 55 und seine Mutter Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony 30. Er hat 1202 in Free, Kerken, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1213 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Sachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm von Lüneburg è nato il il 11 aprile 1184 nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark nel 1202, nel Free, Kerken, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 dicembre 1213, nel Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Sachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Wilhelm von Lüneburgが1184年4月11日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavariaは55歳，母Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxonyは30歳であった。1202年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブケルケンフレでHelena Valdemarsdatter of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1213年12月13日にドイツニーダーサチセンルuネブルグで29歳で死去し，ドイツサチセンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilhelm von Lüneburg(이)가 1184년 4월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1202년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 커켄 프리에서 Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1213년 12월 13일 독일 니더작센 u니버그에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센에 묻혔다.

mn.11 April 1184–13 DEC 1213: 1184 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 11–1213 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 13

pt.11 April 1184–13 DEC 1213: 11 de abril de 1184–13 de dezembro de 1213
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm von Lüneburg nasceu em 11 de abril de 1184, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark em 1202, em Free, Kerken, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1213, em Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Sachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilhelm von Lüneburg родился 11 апреля 1184 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark в 1202 г. в местности фри, киркен, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 декабря 1213 г. в местности лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности сачсен, Германия.

es.11 April 1184–13 DEC 1213: 11 de abril de 1184–13 de diciembre de 1213
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilhelm von Lüneburg nació el 11 de abril de 1184, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry "The Lion" Duke of Saxony and Bavaria, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Matilda of England, Duchess of Saxony, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark en 1202, en Free, Kerken, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1213, en Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Sachsen, Alemania.
